description_long: This is a brown aluminum beverage can with a matte finish and small water droplet textures scattered across its surface, simulating condensation. The can features playful white text, including the phrase 'Tastes like thousand bugs' in a handwritten script and the brand name 'dice-cola' in a bold, modern font running vertically. One side displays a detailed nutrition facts label, parodying typical soda can information, with whimsical references to 'bugs' as a serving size. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening, typical of soft drink cans. The overall shape is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom, and the can appears undamaged and clean. The design and color scheme suggest a novelty or fictional soda product.
description: A brown aluminum soda can with white playful branding, condensation droplets, and a silver pull-tab top. Features whimsical text and a detailed nutrition label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Tastes like thousand bugs' script and part of the 'dice-cola' branding, with visible condensation droplets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical 'dice-cola' branding and the full nutrition facts label, with the pull-tab top partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the nutrition facts label and the continuation of the 'dice-cola' branding, with the can's cylindrical shape prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full 'Tastes like thousand bugs' script and a partial view of the vertical branding, with condensation texture evident.
attribute_label_or_branding: White script text 'Tastes like thousand bugs', vertical 'dice-cola' branding, and a detailed black-and-white nutrition facts label. All branding is printed in white or black on the brown can surface.
